positive: A minimalist, symmetrical, and highly stylized design featuring a whimsical celestial forest grove. The scene should depict stylized bioluminescent mushrooms, winding crystalline root structures, and small, glowing constellations visible through the canopy. Use a high-contrast, ethereal color palette dominated by deep indigo, sapphire blue, and electric turquoise, accented by glowing neon lime and lavender. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and intricate nature-inspired linework (Neo-Art Nouveau), ensuring clean silhouettes and bold, graphic outlines suitable for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, vector art aesthetic, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, messy, cluttered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, noise, signature, copyright, smudge
